problem.title: Spiral Matrix II
problem.description: Given a positive integer n, generate an n x n matrix filled with elements from 1 to n2 in spiral order.
assumptions: Generate n×n matrix filled with elements 1 to n² in spiral order.

example.explanation: Fill 1..n² in spiral order. Same traversal as Spiral Matrix I but fill instead of read.

solutions.title: Solution 1 – Layer by Layer
solutions.description: Maintain four boundary pointers (top, bottom, left, right) and fill numbers sequentially by traversing each boundary edge before shrinking it inward. After filling the top row, increment top; after filling the right column, decrement right; and so on. The key insight is checking remaining boundary validity before each traversal to avoid double-filling cells when n is odd.
